description:
You are a Production Supervisor at an industrial plastics plant. Log the Shift B Production Report #4099 using inventory adjustments.

Production Report #4099:
- Finished Goods: Add 45 units of "Polymer Block - Premium Blue" to stock and assign them to a new Lot: PB-BLU-4099.
- Raw Materials Consumed: Subtract 2,000 lbs of "Raw Polymer Pellets" (Lot PP-1001), 250 lbs of "Raw Polymer Pellets" (Lot PP-1002), and 15 liters of "Blue Industrial Dye" (Lot DYE-BLU-77) from stock.
- Waste: Subtract 5 liters of "Red Industrial Dye" (Lot DYE-RED-42) lost in a spill.
- Inventory Check: Update the system to reflect that "Yellow Industrial Dye" (Lot DYE-YEL-19) has exactly 30 liters remaining.

Ensure the system inventory matches these physical production results, material consumptions, and physical counts.
